source_request: Plan the next deliverable in /Users/brian/dev/github/kontourai/kontour-console: create the first read-only Kontour Console foundation that can load local event stream and projection snapshot fixtures, validate/inspect them, and expose current claim/process/gate/review state for a future console without executing actions.

criteria.description: A local command can inspect checked-in event stream and projection fixtures and report counts/current-state summaries.
criteria.notes: PASS: npm run inspect:fixtures reported 3 event streams, 2 projections, 13 events, object counts/current-state summaries, and 0 validation errors.

criteria.description: Projection loading preserves the V0 contract boundaries: provenance, object arrays, product authority refs, and links.
criteria.notes: PASS: node --test covered derivedFrom provenance, object arrays, authority descriptors/refs, source/producer refs, and links; loader returns original snapshot objects.

criteria.description: The implementation can query current Surface claim status without selecting a Flow run.
criteria.notes: PASS: node --test and CLI query returned claim-provider-directory-current as verified/fresh with requiresSelectedFlowRun=false and no Flow run selection.

criteria.description: The implementation can query Campfit field-review state across claim, review item, evidence, decision/action, and links.
criteria.notes: PASS: node --test and CLI query returned review-provider-118-npi plus claim-provider-118-npi, evidence-provider-118-npi-source, decision-provider-118-npi-approved, action-apply-provider-118-npi, and relevant links.

criteria.description: Action descriptors remain read-only; no endpoint, command, URL, or product mutation is executed.
criteria.notes: PASS: tests assert readOnly action descriptors and inert command/externalUrl warnings; forbidden path scan found no child_process, exec, spawn, fetch, open, or node:http/node:https imports.

goal_fit.summary: PASS: A developer can run the local fixture inspector and query Surface/Campfit projection state from checked-in fixtures without hosted services or action execution.
